case_title: SANDY LEE VS. EDWARD JOHN SVOBODA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR INTERPRETER (CIVIL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SANDY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEE, SANDY AS TO DEFENDANT SVOBODA, EDWARD JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED JAN-10-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SVOBODA, EDWARD JOHN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SANDY LEE IS NOT PRESENT, HOWEVER COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN IS PRESENT AS REQUESTED. APPEARANCE BY EDWARD JOHN SVOBODA, DEFENDANT. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
